content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — Paywall offers a quid-pro-quo review incentive: "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!" (App/PaywallView.swift:11).
Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits offering rewards in exchange for reviews or specific star ratings, as it manipulates App Store ranking integrity (guideline 2.3.9 / 5.6.4). The paywall footnote promises a week of free Premium for a 5-star review — a textbook incentivized-review pattern that may trigger review questions or rejection. Remove the incentive copy and, if you want ratings, use only the standard SKStoreReviewController prompt with no reward attached.
